title: Xlk Momentum Surge After 3-day Volume Spike
thesis: A sudden 50%+ increase in trading volume over 3 days often precedes a momentum-driven price surge in technology stocks. Heavy volume signals renewed buying interest in technology sector ETFs.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily prices and volume for XLK
signal_logic: Enter long if 3-day average volume is at least 50% higher than prior 20-day average volume and price closes up on the 3rd day
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long if 3-day average volume is at least 50% higher than prior 20-day average volume and price closes up on the 3rd day Exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if price falls below 3-day moving average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily prices and volume for XLK via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: XLK trades daily with volume variations that often surpass 50% spikes multiple times a month.

schema.idea: XLK momentum surge after 3-day volume spike

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices and volume for XLK

market_impact.rationale: Heavy volume signals renewed buying interest in technology sector ETFs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if 3-day average volume is at least 50% higher than prior 20-day average volume and price closes up on the 3rd day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if price falls below 3-day moving average

title: Xle Weekly Drawdown Rebound Signal
thesis: After a weekly drawdown exceeding 5%, XLE often rebounds sharply the following week as energy prices stabilize. Energy sector is mean reverting after sharp short-term pullbacks.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance weekly closing prices for XLE
signal_logic: Enter long on weekly close if weekly drawdown is greater than 5% from prior week's close
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long on weekly close if weekly drawdown is greater than 5% from prior week's close Exit: Exit after 2 weeks or if weekly gain turns negative
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance weekly closing prices for XLE via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly drawdowns >5% in XLE occur multiple times a year, triggering timely rebound trades.

data.source: Yahoo Finance weekly closing prices for XLE

schema.behavior: After a weekly drawdown exceeding 5%, XLE often rebounds sharply the following week as energy prices stabilize.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector is mean reverting after sharp short-term pullbacks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on weekly close if weekly drawdown is greater than 5% from prior week's close
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 2 weeks or if weekly gain turns negative

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly drawdowns >5% in XLE occur multiple times a year, triggering timely rebound trades.

thesis: Periods of low volatility contraction in materials ETFs often precede explosive directional moves. Breakouts from volatility compression signal new trends in materials stocks.

title: Xly Daily Retail Volume Surge On Low Volatility Day

implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily volume and price data for XLY via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Such volume/volatility divergences occur frequently during retail consolidation phases.
